campaigns.name: Bank KYC Phishing
campaigns.description: Impersonates banks asking users to re-verify KYC details via fake links.

campaigns.name: Lottery / Prize Scam
campaigns.description: Fake prize notifications demanding fees before releasing winnings.

campaigns.name: Fake Job Offer
campaigns.description: Fake HR recruiters collecting personal data or upfront 'registration' fees.

campaigns.name: Investment / Crypto Scam
campaigns.description: Fraudulent investment schemes promising unrealistic guaranteed returns.

campaigns.name: OTP / SIM Swap Fraud
campaigns.description: Social engineering to extract OTPs for unauthorized transactions.

campaigns.name: Fake Delivery Notification
campaigns.description: Fake courier notifications requiring payment to release packages.

campaigns.name: Government Impersonation
campaigns.description: Scammers impersonating IT dept, police, or UIDAI to extort money.

campaigns.name: Credential Phishing
campaigns.description: Phishing pages mimicking real services to steal login credentials.
